author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Add mesh and slicer checks to the CI loop**

For the companion blueprint's generated-model projects, rendering an STL and relying on GitHub's viewer does not catch non-manifold geometry or profile-specific slicing failures before the friend tries to print. Add the missing CI tools here: e.g. [ADMesh](https://github.com/admesh/admesh) or [trimesh](https://github.com/mikedh/trimesh) for watertight/manifold checks, plus a PrusaSlicer/Slic3r CLI smoke slice using `--export-gcode` with the committed profile ([Slic3r CLI docs](https://manual.slic3r.org/advanced/command-line)).

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
